'''zonakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthylic|xanthylic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthylic|xanthylic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zonakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonakithi|zonakithi]] || [[word:zonakiji|zonakiji]] || [[word:zonakishi|zonakishi]] || [[word:zonakiki|zonakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonakuthuthu|zonakuthuthu]] || [[word:zonakujuju|zonakujuju]] || [[word:zonakushushu|zonakushushu]] || [[word:zonakukuku|zonakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonakuthu|zonakuthu]] || [[word:zonakuju|zonakuju]] || [[word:zonakushu|zonakushu]] || [[word:zonakuku|zonakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonakufthuf|zonakufthuf]] || [[word:zonakufjuf|zonakufjuf]] || [[word:zonakufshuf|zonakufshuf]] || [[word:zonakufkuf|zonakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonakethe|zonakethe]] || [[word:zonakeje|zonakeje]] || [[word:zonakeshe|zonakeshe]] || [[word:zonakeke|zonakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonakothotho|zonakothotho]] || [[word:zonakojojo|zonakojojo]] || [[word:zonakoshosho|zonakoshosho]] || [[word:zonakokoko|zonakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonakotho|zonakotho]] || [[word:zonakojo|zonakojo]] || [[word:zonakosho|zonakosho]] || [[word:zonakoko|zonakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonakofthof|zonakofthof]] || [[word:zonakofjof|zonakofjof]] || [[word:zonakofshof|zonakofshof]] || [[word:zonakofkof|zonakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfthÃŸf|zonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfjÃŸf|zonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfshÃŸf|zonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfkÃŸf|zonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zonakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zonakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zonakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zonakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfthÃŸf|zonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfjÃŸf|zonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfshÃŸf|zonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfkÃŸf|zonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfthÃŸf|zonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfjÃŸf|zonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfshÃŸf|zonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zonakÃŸfkÃŸf|zonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonakÃḊthÃḊ|zonakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zonakÃḊjÃḊ|zonakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zonakÃḊshÃḊ|zonakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zonakÃḊkÃḊ|zonakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonakathatha|zonakathatha]] || [[word:zonakajaja|zonakajaja]] || [[word:zonakashasha|zonakashasha]] || [[word:zonakakaka|zonakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonakatha|zonakatha]] || [[word:zonakaja|zonakaja]] || [[word:zonakasha|zonakasha]] || [[word:zonakaka|zonakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonakafthaf|zonakafthaf]] || [[word:zonakafjaf|zonakafjaf]] || [[word:zonakafshaf|zonakafshaf]] || [[word:zonakafkaf|zonakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zonakasha|zonakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonakshÃḋasha|zonakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonakroasha|zonakroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonakmuasha|zonakmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonakyaasha|zonakyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonaknkshÃḋasha|gozonaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonaknkroasha|gozonaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonaknkmuasha|gozonaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonaknkyaasha|gozonaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zonanakasha|zonanakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonanakshÃḋasha|zonanakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonanakroasha|zonanakroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonanakmuasha|zonanakmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonanakyaasha|zonanakyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonanaknkshÃḋasha|gozonanaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonanaknkroasha|gozonanaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonanaknkmuasha|gozonanaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonanaknkyaasha|gozonanaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zenÃḊkasha|zenÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zenÃḊkshÃḋasha|zenÃḊkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zenÃḊkroasha|zenÃḊkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zenÃḊkmuasha|zenÃḊkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zenÃḊkyaasha|zenÃḊkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozenÃḊknkshÃḋasha|gozenÃḊknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozenÃḊknkroasha|gozenÃḊknkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozenÃḊknkmuasha|gozenÃḊknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozenÃḊknkyaasha|gozenÃḊknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zonfakasha|zonfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonfakshÃḋasha|zonfakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonfakroasha|zonfakroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonfakmuasha|zonfakmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonfakyaasha|zonfakyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonfaknkshÃḋasha|gozonfaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonfaknkroasha|gozonfaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonfaknkmuasha|gozonfaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonfaknkyaasha|gozonfaknkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
